label: Ontology Completeness

deductions.reason: Ontology contract requires complete relationship coverage.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_relationship.

deductions.reason: Ontology contract requires complete claim coverage.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run the matching builder agent for missing_claim.

deductions.reason: Condition neighborhoods require regional anatomy per condition.anatomy.min_structures.
deductions.suggestedFix: Add essential regional anatomy via anatomy builder or shared anatomy reuse.

deductions.reason: Fracture diagnoses require classification when one exists clinically.
deductions.suggestedFix: Link has_classification and has_grade edges to a classification system.

recommendations: Run the matching builder agent for missing_relationship.
Run the matching builder agent for missing_claim.
Add essential regional anatomy via anatomy builder or shared anatomy reuse.
Link has_classification and has_grade edges to a classification system.
